text: This is the VOA Special English Technology Report.
zh: 这里是美国之音特别英语科技报道。

text: This year is the 75th anniversary of the Golden Gate Bridge in California.
zh: 今年是加利福尼亚州金门大桥建成75周年。

text: It opened to vehicle traffic on May 28, 1937. seven.
zh: 它于1937年5月28日正式通车。

text: Since then, more than two billion vehicles have crossed the world -famous bridge linking San Francisco
zh: 从那时起，已有超过二十亿辆车驶过这座连接旧金山

text: and Marin County. The bridge is named after the Golden Gate Strait.
zh: 与马林县的世界著名大桥。这座桥以金门海峡命名。

text: That narrow passage of water connects San Francisco Bay to the Pacific Ocean.
zh: 这条狭窄的水道连接着旧金山湾与太平洋。

text: The Golden Gate Bridge had the longest suspension span in the world at the time it was built.
zh: 金门大桥建成时拥有世界上最长的悬索跨度。

text: The suspended roadway stretches 1 ,280
zh: 桥面悬索跨度长达1280米，

text: meters between the bridge's two tall towers.
zh: 横跨大桥两座高塔之间。

text: Today the Golden Gate still rates among the 10 longest bridge spans.
zh: 如今，金门大桥仍位列世界十大最长桥跨之一。

text: Mary Curry works for the Golden Gate Bridge Highway and Transportation District. She says the bridge
zh: 玛丽·柯里在金门大桥公路与交通管理局工作。她说这座桥

text: represents one of the most extraordinary engineering projects of all time.
zh: 是有史以来最非凡的工程项目之一。

text: She calls it an engineering marvel and says it gets award after award
zh: 她称之为工程奇迹，说它因其

text: for what it means in civil engineering and structural engineering.
zh: 在土木工程和结构工程方面的意义而屡获殊荣。

text: She says the Golden Gate Bridge is also a place where things happen first.
zh: 她说金门大桥也是许多‘第一次’发生的地方。

text: For example, it was the first suspension bridge to have to change the roadway deck.
zh: 例如，它是第一座不得不更换桥面板的悬索桥。

text: The bridge is 27 meters wide and 2 ,788 meters long.
zh: 这座桥宽27米，长2788米。

text: Two large cables pass over the top of the bridge's towers.
zh: 两根巨大的缆索横跨大桥塔顶。

text: These structures stand 227 meters above the water
zh: 这些桥塔高出水面227米，

text: and 152 meters above the road.
zh: 高出路面152米。

text: Each cable holds more than 27 ,500 strands of wire. 250
zh: 每根主缆由超过27500股钢丝组成。

text: pairs of vertical suspender ropes connect the support cables to
zh: 250对垂直吊索将支撑缆索与

text: the suspension bridge. This is part of what enables the bridge to move up
zh: 悬索桥连接在一起。这也是大桥能够上下移动

text: and down by nearly 5 meters.
zh: 近5米的原因之一。

text: The project took four years to complete. Work began in 1933.
zh: 整个项目耗时四年完成，工程始于1933年。

text: The Golden Gate Bridge weighed more than 800 ,000 metric tons when it was completed.
zh: 金门大桥建成时重量超过80万公吨。

text: The San Francisco Chronicle newspaper called it a 35 million dollar steel harp.
zh: 《旧金山纪事报》称它为‘三千五百万美元的钢铁竖琴’。

text: Joseph Strauss was the chief engineer of the Golden Gate Bridge project.
zh: 约瑟夫·施特劳斯是金门大桥项目的总工程师。

text: But architect Irving Murrow gets credit for its bright orange color,
zh: 但建筑师欧文·莫罗因其亮橙色的桥身设计而广受称赞，

text: known as international orange.
zh: 这种颜色被称为‘国际橙’。

text: The Navy wanted the bridge painted in yellow and black.
zh: 海军曾希望大桥漆成黄黑相间的颜色。

text: The Air Force had suggested red and white.
zh: 空军则建议漆成红白相间。

text: But Mary Currie says Irving Murrow knew that orange would blend with the environment.
zh: 但玛丽·柯里说，欧文·莫罗知道橙色能与周围环境相融。

text: It would contrast with the ocean and the air
zh: 它能与海洋和上方的天空

text: above. And it would also allow the Art Deco styling to really stand out.
zh: 形成对比，同时也能让装饰艺术风格更加突出。

text: For VOA Special English, I'm Carolyn Presutti.
zh: 美国之音特别英语报道，我是卡罗琳·普雷苏蒂。
